titles.text: 三国志列伝 乱世の英雄たち
San Guo Zhi Lie Zhuan: Luan Shi Qun Ying
San Guo Zhi Lie Zhuan: Luan Shi Qun Ying

descriptions.text: Sangokushi Retsuden: Ransei no Eiyuu-tachi is a 1991 simulation game by Sega released in Japan — and China, where it was called San Guo Zhi Lie Zhuan: Luan Shi Qun Ying. Whether or not the game has any connections to Koei, who makes the most popular games based around China's Three Kingdoms time periods, is unknown.
